'''鈭歞h-n-ch-f''' ('''kadhanchefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dumbfounder|dumbfounder]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-n-ch-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dumbfounder|dumbfounder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-n-ch-f
|-
! Lemma
| kadhanchefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhanchefoko|thidhanchefoko]] || [[word:jidhanchefoko|jidhanchefoko]] || [[word:shidhanchefoko|shidhanchefoko]] || [[word:kidhanchefoko|kidhanchefoko]]
